title: Security
description: The data must be secured in order for the System to be available everywhere, reliable, and secure

title: Performance
description: The application should work fast without any errors or delays or system failure

title: Usability
description: The app will provide friendly user interface that suitable for all type of people

title: Accessibility
description: User must own a smart mobile phone and have basic English knowledge

title: Reliability
description: Our goal to build reliable mobile application that is easy for users to use it anywhere

title: Compatibility
description: Alert mobile application can work with iOS and Android operating systems

title: Scalability
description: The application should be able to handle a large number of users and crimes

title: Maintainability
description: The application should be easy to maintain and update

title: Response Time
description: All application should load at least in 3 seconds
